summary: Add continuation budget and compact progress checkpoints
description: Make go auto usable for long trains by adding max-minutes/max-commands/checkpoint cadence and compact TG summaries only at completion/blocker/checkpoint.
acceptance: CLI/handoff has budget fields for max tasks, max minutes/commands, and checkpoint cadence.
Default Telegram-facing summary is quiet until done/blocker/checkpoint.

evidence.summary: Added go auto/go-loop budget fields max_minutes, max_commands, checkpoint_every_tasks, quiet telegram_policy, command/checkpoint result accounting, tests for budget envelope and checkpoints; verification: pytest -q 10 passed; make check passed; git diff --check passed
